caption: A woman with blonde braided hair, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm, facing towards the left. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a dark screen displaying the word "ohnson" in red. A small sign above the screen reads "Employees Only". On-screen graphics include the logo "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular "PODCAST" badge. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks towards someone off-screen. Her posture remains relatively still, with subtle movements in her facial expressions as she listens or prepares to speak. The camera angle and the surrounding equipment, including the microphone and studio background, remain constant throughout the clip.
